tasks.prompt:
Run the news-aggregator-skill to generate a comprehensive morning news briefing. Use the following sources to cover all categories:
1. Silicon Valley tech: hackernews, producthunt
2. China VC/startups: 36kr, tencent
3. Open source community: github
4. Financial markets: wallstreetcn
5. International news: international (bbc, guardian, aljazeera, france24, reuters)
6. Top AI podcasts/hardcore tweets: podcasts (lexfridman, latentspace), ai_newsletters

Follow the universal workflow in SKILL.md:
Step 1: python3 scripts/fetch_news.py --source hackernews,producthunt,36kr,tencent,github,wallstreetcn,international,podcasts,ai_newsletters --limit 10 --deep --no-save
Step 2: Generate a beautiful Markdown report following the Unified Report Template
Step 3: Save to reports/YYYY-MM-DD/morning_briefing.md and display

Translate everything to Simplified Chinese. Provide Deep Dive insights. Save the final report.
